text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the Fan Fest. The academy is
packed with Umamusume fans.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming! I hope you have fun today!
Oh, and don't miss our amazing dance!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's all have fun together and make today a
happy day!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, isn't that... Narita Brian and Biwa
Hayahide?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're too close. We stand out way too much.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you implying that my hair stands out?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not what I said.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: They look so smart and cool! Ugh, I love them!

While everyone is enjoying mingling with fans,
Nice Nature is...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Their charm and glamor are beyond even
idol level...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They really are the stars. No wonder their fans are
so obsessed with them.
choice_data_list: Why don't you go and meet your fans?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'd love to, but after everyone else was so cool...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A normal girl like me won't bring any excitement.
choice_data_list:
Right now, we should be focusing on building
your fanbase.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why would—ah, right. The Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The roster is based on a fan poll, right? I guess I do need to put some effort in.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Problem is that I'm not particularly
attention-grabbing... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess I should at least practice exercising
my charms, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Me and my big mouth.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Little Miss Cutie-Pie ☆
Umamusume Pageant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm your host, the class rep of all class reps,
Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
One notable contestant has joined us at the
last-minute... Nice Nature! Will she charm her way
into your heart?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Why is this happening?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer, you betrayed me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well then, Nice Nature! Show us your charm!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, I'm good...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What was that? You want to hear a little more
excitement from the audience?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I didn't say that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We need your help, everyone! Let's hear it for
Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: You can do thiiiis, Nice Natureeee!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: I wanna see your charm! Go, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... No escaping now...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I can't do thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I can't! I don't have the charming
personality that the other adorable stars have...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text: That's not true! You're cute in your own way!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What?! Wait, why's everyone from the shopping
district here?!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text: They're right, Natie! Just be yourself!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Let 'em hear your go-to karaoke song, "Emotional
Flame, Women's Grudge"!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, but that's an enka song! That's not cute at
all!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Come on, Nature!

Although not cute in the traditional sense of the
word, Nice Nature's charm comes through as one
who is loved by many.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No turning back now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The name's Nice Nature! I'm on a journey to
become a mature and marvelous lady! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sh-shwiiing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uuuurgh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I know! That was spine-chillingly bad! I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: B-but!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Please... don't be grossed out...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! You are so cuuuute, Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text: She's blushing! She's so adorable!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: That was adorable! You're our idol, Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: S-stop! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: You are Little Miss Cutie-Pie, Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Come rescue meee!

The audience bursts into excitement at the sight
of Nice Nature's shyness. The contest ends with
Nice Nature successfully capturing the hearts of
many.
